description_long: This is a single-story, sprawling house with a low-pitched, multi-section hip roof in a light gray color. The structure is arranged in an L-shaped or ranch-style layout, with several wings extending outward and a central covered entryway supported by columns. The exterior walls are finished in a combination of beige and brown tones, and the windows are rectangular and symmetrically distributed along the facades. A detached rectangular swimming pool is visible near the house, and a palm tree is situated close to the main entrance, adding a touch of landscaping. The house features a prominent garage with a visible door and a sheltered front porch area.
description: A large, single-story ranch-style house with a light gray hip roof, beige and brown exterior, symmetrical windows, a covered entryway, and a detached swimming pool.
description_view_0: The house is seen from the side, showing the L-shaped layout, multiple roof sections, and a palm tree near the central area.
description_view_1: This view highlights the rear and side of the house, with the detached swimming pool clearly visible to the right.
description_view_2: The front of the house is visible, featuring the main entryway with columns, the garage door, and the swimming pool in the foreground.
description_view_3: The opposite side of the house is shown, with the pool to the left and the palm tree near the center of the structure.
attribute_entryway_design: Central covered entryway with columns, overhang, and a sheltered porch area
